faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in North Bellmore?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service in North Bellmore depending on availability. Emergency situations involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas are prioritized. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours once our technician arrives at your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our flat-rate pricing includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in North Bellmore?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use professional-grade protective equipment and proven techniques to remove hornet nests safely. We establish safety perimeters during treatment and use products that are effective against hornets while minimizing risk to people and pets. We advise keeping children and animals indoors during the removal process.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have hornets versus wasps or bees?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps, measuring up to 1.5 inches long, with distinctive white and black or brown markings. Their nests are usually gray, papery structures found in trees, attics, or under eaves. If you're unsure, our North Bellmore technicians can identify the species during inspection and recommend the appropriate removal strategy for your specific situation.
